channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Razer's BLACKPINK Collaboration Hits Stores In May, Celebrating The Group's DEADLINE Tour
item.content:encoded:
Razer's latest collaboration is with K-pop group BLACKPINK, and you don't have to wait long to get your hands on its upcoming collection, as the gear will launch in Razer Stores and online on May 7th.

The collaboration was first unveiled back at the group's pop-up store in Hong Kong as part of its <DEADLINE> world tour, bringing the group's bold aesthetic to Razer's line-up of PC gaming accessories. The collaboration includes the following:

  • Razer Ornata V3 Tenkeyless - BLACKPINK Edition ($119.99 USD)
  • Razer DeathAdder Essential - BLACKPINK Edition ($49.99 USD)
  • Razer Gigantus V2 - Medium Mouse Mat - BLACKPINK Edition ($29.99 USD)
  • Razer Enki X - BLACKPINK Edition ($499.99 USD)

The collection sees the familiar green accents on Razer's products replaced with the iconic pink stylings of the KPOP group, and even in the pictures they pop. Speaking of pictures, Razer also announced that each product will come with a complimentary BLACKPINK photo card, which the company states was made specifically for this collaboration. 

If you're interested in the collab, you can swing by your local Razer Store (if you have one nearby) or grab a collection piece on the Razer website starting on May 7th at 8am for their early access sale. Otherwise, you can grab the collection from select retailers starting on May 14th. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/hardware/razers-blackpink-collaboration-hits-stores-in-may-celebrating-the-groups-deadline-tour-2000137915
